Veqtor v0.1.0 is a local technical Alpha for early adopters working with DOCX
negotiation history. It can extract and verify tracked changes, dry-run explicit
counter-edits, write supported edits as tracked changes, and retain local
decision provenance.

This is not a hosted service, legal-advice system, general-purpose Word editor
or tamper-evident audit log. Review the
[known limitations](https://github.com/JohnDeer-ai/veqtor-mcp/blob/v0.1.0/KNOWN_LIMITATIONS.md)
before using it on a matter. Keep source documents and raw `.veqtor` journals
private.
